name: tradernet-mcp-codex
description: Connect Codex to Tradernet over MCP with safe workflows for quotes, portfolio data, orders, reports, tariffs, and SID session refresh.

interface.shortDescription: Use Tradernet API tools from Codex
interface.longDescription: Tradernet MCP connects Codex to Tradernet over Streamable HTTP. It exposes market data, portfolio reads, orders, tariffs, reports, watchlists, alerts, and SID-based session utilities. The plugin keeps secrets in environment variables and includes safety guidance for real-account actions.
defaultPrompt: Check TSLA quotes and recent Tradernet news
Refresh my Tradernet SID for Codex
